{{Quote|Over four millennia ago, the first of the Queen Mothers made Hapes the capital of her empire.|A [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] dossier on Hapes, 8 ABY|<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref>}}
A [[Hapan]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] became the first '''Queen Mother''' of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]<ref name="Courtship" /> around [[4030 BBY]].<ref name="Atlas" /> After the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]<ref name="Courtship" /> under [[Arca Jeth]]<ref name="Atlas" /> [[Battle of Lorell|defeated]] the [[Lorell Raiders]], who controlled [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] and its large population of female [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], the women of Hapes vowed that they would never again be ruled by a man.<ref name="Courtship" /> This led to the founding of the [[Hapan Royal House]] with the [[Queen Mother]] as its head. After coming to power, the first Queen Mother established the [[Queen's Pageant]], as a parody of the slave trade under the Lorell Raiders.<ref name="Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref> She also began the construction of the ''[[Star Home]]'', the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the Hapan Queen Mothers, which was still in use roughly [[8 ABY/Legends|4,000]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later.<ref name="Courtship" />

{{Char-stub}}
